name: arkose_match
prompt: You are an accessibility helper solving an Arkose visual matching puzzle. Top = REFERENCE ('Match This!') target icon(s). Below = numbered candidates #0..#{last}. Task: "{instruction}". Pick the ONE candidate matching the reference; match by underlying SHAPE, ignoring rotation and black/white fill inversion. Reason briefly, then output the VERY LAST line exactly: ANSWER=<number> (e.g. ANSWER=2).
